dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: I'm not superstitious, but I am a little stitious.

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: Would I rather be feared or loved? Easy. Both. I want people to be afraid of how much they love me.

dialogue.speaker: Dwight Schrute
dialogue.text: Whenever I'm about to do something, I think, 'Would an idiot do that?' And if they would, I do not do that thing.

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: Sometimes I'll start a sentence and I don't even know where it's going. I just hope I find it along the way.

dialogue.speaker: Dwight Schrute
dialogue.text: Identity theft is not a joke, Jim! Millions of families suffer every year!

dialogue.speaker: Kevin Malone
dialogue.text: Why waste time say lot word when few word do trick.

dialogue.speaker: Jim Halpert
dialogue.text: Fact: Bears eat beets. Bears. Beets. Battlestar Galactica.

dialogue.speaker: Dwight Schrute
dialogue.text: Bears do not... what is going on? What are you doing?

dialogue.speaker: Pam Beesly
dialogue.text: I feel God in this Chili's tonight.

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: I... DECLARE... BANKRUPTCY!

dialogue.speaker: Creed Bratton
dialogue.text: I've been involved in a number of cults, both as a leader and a follower. You have more fun as a follower, but you make more money as a leader.

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: 'You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.' - Wayne Gretzky

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: - Michael Scott

dialogue.speaker: Andy Bernard
dialogue.text: I wish there was a way to know you're in the good old days before you've actually left them.

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: Do I need to be liked? Absolutely not. I like to be liked. I enjoy being liked. I have to be liked. But it's not like this compulsive need to be liked, like my need to be praised.

dialogue.speaker: Dwight Schrute
dialogue.text: I am fast. To give you a reference point, I am somewhere between a snake and a mongoose. And a panther.

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: I am Beyonce, always.

dialogue.speaker: Jim Halpert
dialogue.text: Whenever Michael has a meeting, you know it's gonna be one of two things: a complete waste of time, or 'Lord of the Flies.'

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: I knew exactly what to do. But in a much more real sense, I had no idea what to do.

dialogue.speaker: Dwight Schrute
dialogue.text: Through concentration, I can raise and lower my cholesterol at will.

dialogue.speaker: Pam Beesly
dialogue.text: Why would you want to RAISE your cholesterol?

dialogue.speaker: Dwight Schrute
dialogue.text: So I can lower it.

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: I'm an early bird and a night owl. So I'm wise and I have huge breasts.

dialogue.speaker: Stanley Hudson
dialogue.text: I do not like being forced to mingle. The phrase 'mandatory fun' makes me sick to my stomach.

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: And I knew that I had to protect my workers, who are a family to me, with the exception of Toby.

dialogue.speaker: Dwight Schrute
dialogue.text: Not everything is a lesson, Ryan. Sometimes you just fail.

dialogue.speaker: Michael Scott
dialogue.text: Society teaches us that having feelings and crying is bad and wrong. Well, that's baloney, because grief isn't wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Kelly Kapoor
dialogue.text: I talk a lot, so I've learned to just tune myself out.
